% === Table: M1 Executability by LLM and Prompt Strategy ===
\begin{table}[t]
  \caption{M1 Executability (\%) by LLM and prompt strategy. Each cell: pass/total (15 runs).}\label{tab:m1grid}
  \centering
  \begin{tabular}{@{}lcccc@{}}
    \toprule
    \textbf{LLM} & \textbf{Zero-shot} & \textbf{Schema-aware} & \textbf{Few-shot} & \textbf{Overall} \\
    \midrule
    GPT-4o & 73\% (11/15) & 100\% (15/15) & 100\% (15/15) & 91\% (41/45) \\
    Claude Sonnet & 100\% (15/15) & 100\% (15/15) & 100\% (15/15) & 100\% (45/45) \\
    Llama 3 70B & 73\% (11/15) & 67\% (10/15) & 73\% (11/15) & 71\% (32/45) \\
    \midrule
    \textbf{Overall} & \textbf{82\%} (37/45) & \textbf{89\%} (40/45) & \textbf{91\%} (41/45) & \textbf{87\%} (118/135) \\
    \bottomrule
  \end{tabular}
\end{table}

% === Table: M1 Executability by Task ===
\begin{table}[t]
  \caption{M1 Executability (\%) by clinical process task (27 runs each).}\label{tab:m1task}
  \centering
  \begin{tabular}{@{}llcc@{}}
    \toprule
    \textbf{Task} & \textbf{Process} & \textbf{M1 Pass} & \textbf{Rate} \\
    \midrule
    T1 & ICU Pathway & 27/27 & \textbf{100\%} \\
    T2 & Medication Admin. & 17/27 & 63\% \\
    T3 & Sepsis Trajectory & 27/27 & \textbf{100\%} \\
    T4 & Lab-Order Cycle & 20/27 & 74\% \\
    T5 & ED Flow & 27/27 & \textbf{100\%} \\
    \midrule
    \textbf{Total} & & 118/135 & 87\% \\
    \bottomrule
  \end{tabular}
\end{table}

% === Table: M3/M4 Main Results (averaged across tasks) ===
\begin{table}[t]
  \caption{M3 Completeness and M4 Fidelity results averaged across all five tasks. Bold = best in column. --- = ground-truth SQL not yet available.}\label{tab:m3m4}
  \centering
  \begin{tabular}{@{}llccc@{}}
    \toprule
    \textbf{LLM} & \textbf{Strategy} & \textbf{M3a (case cov.)} & \textbf{M3b (act.~cov.)} & \textbf{M4a (Jaccard)} \\
    \midrule
    GPT-4o & Zero-shot & \cellcolor{yellow!30}60.0\% & \cellcolor{red!20}0.1\% & \cellcolor{red!20}0.001 \\
     & Schema-aware & \cellcolor{green!20}\textbf{100.0\%} & \cellcolor{red!20}0.2\% & \cellcolor{red!20}0.002 \\
     & Few-shot & \cellcolor{green!20}83.3\% & \cellcolor{red!20}0.1\% & \cellcolor{red!20}0.002 \\
    \midrule
    Claude Sonnet & Zero-shot & \cellcolor{green!20}100.0\% & \cellcolor{red!20}\textbf{0.3\%} & \cellcolor{red!20}\textbf{0.003} \\
     & Schema-aware & \cellcolor{green!20}91.8\% & \cellcolor{red!20}0.1\% & \cellcolor{red!20}0.001 \\
     & Few-shot & \cellcolor{green!20}100.0\% & \cellcolor{red!20}0.2\% & \cellcolor{red!20}0.002 \\
    \midrule
    Llama 3 70B & Zero-shot & \cellcolor{green!20}66.7\% & \cellcolor{red!20}0.1\% & \cellcolor{red!20}0.001 \\
     & Schema-aware & \cellcolor{yellow!30}60.0\% & \cellcolor{red!20}0.1\% & \cellcolor{red!20}0.001 \\
     & Few-shot & \cellcolor{yellow!30}60.0\% & \cellcolor{red!20}0.2\% & \cellcolor{red!20}0.002 \\
    \midrule
    \bottomrule
  \end{tabular}
\end{table}
